steps.title: Look for shared wave traits
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between P waves and S waves. The notes say both are seismic waves that travel beneath Earth's surface and both cause the ground to move, even though they move it in different ways.

steps.title: Avoid difference-focused options
steps.content: Choice B compares their speeds, which is a difference. Choice C discusses only P waves. Choice D explicitly says the waves behave very differently. The remaining choice states what both waves share. The answer is A.
